owner.name: Abhishek
owner.role: Building fast, scalable and premium full-stack web applications
owner.tagline: I build modern full-stack applications with scalable architecture, clean UI systems, and performance-focused user experiences using technologies like Next.js, Appwrite, and modern frontend frameworks.

about.intro: I turn ideas into premium web products with clear structure, thoughtful interactions, and strong performance. My focus is responsive UI, smooth motion, and production-ready front-end quality.

projects.title: VisionSuite AI
projects.description: AI-powered face recognition attendance and real-time object detection platform.

projects.title: SmartQueue AI
projects.description: SmartQueue AI is a modern queue management platform that enables organizations to eliminate long waiting lines through QR check-ins, live token tracking, AI-powered wait-time prediction, real-time dashboards, and automated notifications.

completedProjects.title: Website Speed Optimization & Performance Enhancement
completedProjects.workDone: Optimized website performance by reducing load time and improving Core Web Vitals. Minimized CSS and JavaScript, optimized images, and implemented lazy loading for faster rendering. Fixed layout shifts and enhanced mobile responsiveness to ensure a smooth user experience. Improved overall performance and achieved higher PageSpeed Insights scores on both mobile and desktop.

completedProjects.title: Guruji Taxi – API Integration & Frontend Fixes (Internship
completedProjects.workDone:
Worked as a Frontend Developer Intern to improve and maintain the Guruji Taxi website. Integrated dynamic images using external APIs to replace static content, making the system more scalable and easier to manage. Fixed UI issues, improved responsiveness across devices, and ensured consistent layout and design. Optimized image loading and frontend performance to enhance overall user experience. 
Contributed to real-world production website improvements during internship, focusing on performance and UI/UX enhancements.

completedProjects.title: Sania Enterprises – API Integration & Frontend Fixes (Internship)
completedProjects.workDone:
Worked as a Frontend Developer Intern to enhance and maintain the Sania Enterprises website. Integrated dynamic content and images using external APIs to replace static data, improving scalability and content management. Fixed UI issues, improved responsiveness across devices, and ensured consistent layout and design. Optimized frontend performance and image loading for a faster and smoother user experience.
Reduced dependency on static content by implementing API-driven dynamic rendering.

completedProjects.title: Medical Seva – Static Website Development (Internship)
completedProjects.workDone: Developed a clean and responsive static webpage for Medical Seva during internship. Built the layout using modern frontend practices, ensuring mobile responsiveness and cross-browser compatibility. Focused on clear UI structure, fast loading performance, and smooth user experience. Implemented structured sections for services, information, and contact to improve usability and accessibility. Delivered a lightweight, fast-loading static page optimized for performance and simple user navigation.

experience.summary: Leading web development projects at Parvati & Sons, managing frontend improvements, performance optimization, feature updates, deployment workflows, and overall website maintenance while contributing to full-stack development and UI/UX enhancements.

journeyNow.currentWork: Parvati & Sons — Project Manager & Full Stack Developer

services.title: Fixing Website
services.description: Fixing website bugs, layout issues, responsiveness problems, broken sections, and improving overall performance for a smoother user experience.

projectsDetailed.title: VisionSuite AI
projectsDetailed.shortDescription: AI-powered face recognition attendance and real-time object detection platform.
projectsDetailed.longDescription: VisionSuite AI is an enterprise-grade computer vision platform that combines AI face recognition attendance with real-time object detection and analytics. It enables organizations to automate attendance, monitor security, and generate detailed reports through an intuitive dashboard.
projectsDetailed.metaTitle: VisionSuite AI | AI Face Recognition Attendance System
projectsDetailed.metaDescription: Enterprise AI platform for face recognition attendance, object detection, analytics, and security monitoring built with Next.js, FastAPI, and OpenCV.

projectsDetailed.title: SmartQueue AI
projectsDetailed.subtitle: AI-Powered Real-Time Queue Management SaaS
projectsDetailed.shortDescription: SmartQueue AI is a modern queue management platform that enables organizations to eliminate long waiting lines through QR check-ins, live token tracking, AI-powered wait-time prediction, real-time dashboards, and automated notifications.
projectsDetailed.fullDescription: SmartQueue AI is an enterprise-grade SaaS platform built for clinics, hospitals, banks, government offices, salons, and service centers. It digitizes traditional queues using QR-based check-ins, real-time token tracking, WebSockets, AI wait-time prediction, staff dashboards, analytics, and multi-tenant organization management. The platform provides customers with live queue visibility while giving administrators complete operational control through a modern dashboard.
projectsDetailed.keyFeatures:
QR Code Check-in
Live Token Tracking
AI Wait Time Prediction
WebSocket Real-time Updates
Public Display Screen
Multi-Branch Support
Role Based Access Control
Analytics Dashboard
Notification System
Queue Reports
projectsDetailed.coreModules:
Authentication
Organization Management
Branch Management
Service Management
Counter Management
Queue Engine
Analytics
Notifications
Public Display
Staff Dashboard
projectsDetailed.futureRoadmap:
Mobile Apps
Voice Announcements
Face Recognition Check-in
Appointment Booking
AI Queue Optimization
Multi-language Support
Billing System
projectsDetailed.problemStatement: Long physical queues create frustration, increase waiting time, and reduce operational efficiency. Most organizations still rely on manual token systems that lack live tracking, analytics, and customer notifications.
projectsDetailed.targetUsers: Clinics, Hospitals, Banks, Government Offices, Restaurants, Salons, Service Centers.
projectsDetailed.businessValue: Reduces customer waiting time, improves staff productivity, increases operational visibility, and enhances customer experience.
projectsDetailed.impact: Digitizes traditional queue systems into an intelligent real-time SaaS platform.
projectsDetailed.challengesFaced: Designing a scalable real-time architecture, synchronizing WebSocket events, implementing AI wait-time estimation, and maintaining multi-tenant organization isolation.
projectsDetailed.learnings: Large-scale SaaS architecture, Django Channels, WebSockets, JWT Authentication, Redis, scalable REST APIs, AI-based prediction systems, and enterprise dashboard design.
projectsDetailed.frontend: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion, Zustand, TanStack Query
projectsDetailed.backend: Django, Django REST Framework, Django Channels
projectsDetailed.apisIntegrations: REST API, WebSockets, Cloudinary, Resend Email
projectsDetailed.architectureNotes: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with Django REST APIs, Redis-powered WebSockets, JWT authentication, PostgreSQL database, and modular frontend using Next.js.
projectsDetailed.techBadges: Full Stack • AI • SaaS • Real-Time • Enterprise • WebSockets
projectsDetailed.metaTitle: SmartQueue AI – AI-Powered Real-Time Queue Management SaaS
projectsDetailed.metaDescription: SmartQueue AI is a modern AI-powered queue management platform featuring QR check-ins, live token tracking, WebSockets, analytics, notifications, and intelligent wait-time prediction for clinics, hospitals, banks, and service centers.
projectsDetailed.solution: SmartQueue AI provides a fully digital queue management platform where customers join queues using QR codes, receive live updates, AI-generated wait-time predictions, and notifications while staff manage operations through real-time dashboards.
